leadText: Shadow Down (Japanese: ダークダウン Dark Down) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Down is a Shadow version of Screech . It lowers the Defense of both opponents by two stages each. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Down cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A shadowy aura sharply cuts the foe's Defense.
